texto: The cool wind blew in my face and all at once I felt as if I had shed dullness from myself. Before me lay a long gray line with a black mark down the center. The birds were singing. It was spring.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Burl Ives: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de esforço, persistência e resultados. O trecho “The cool wind blew in my face and all at once I felt as if I had shed dullness from myself. Befor…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que sucesso, myself, cool pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de cool e spring.
